info.title: fhir-pkg-cli
info.description: CLI tool for managing FHIR packages — install, restore, list, search, and cache management.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: fhir-pkg — CLI tool for managing FHIR packages: install, restore, list, search, and cache management.

options.name: --package-cache-folder
options.description: Path to the local FHIR package cache directory.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output results as JSON for machine consumption. [default: False]

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install one or more FHIR packages into the local cache.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Overwrite packages already in the cache [default: False]

options.name: --fhir-version
options.description: Preferred FHIR release (R4, R4B, R5, R6)

arguments.name: packages
arguments.description: One or more package directives (e.g. hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1)

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Restore FHIR package dependencies from a project manifest.

options.name: --lock-file
options.description: Path to a lock file to use for deterministic restores.

options.name: --no-lock
options.description: Do not write or update the lock file. [default: False]

options.name: --conflict-strategy
options.description: Strategy for resolving version conflicts (HighestWins, FirstWins, Error). [default: HighestWins]

options.name: --max-depth
options.description: Maximum recursion depth for dependency resolution. [default: 20]

options.name: --fhir-version
options.description: Preferred FHIR release (R4, R4B, R5, R6).

arguments.name: project-path
arguments.description: Path to the project directory containing a package manifest. [default: .]

commands.name: list
commands.description: List FHIR packages in the local cache.

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort order: name, version, date, size. [default: name]

options.name: --show-size
options.description: Include package sizes in the output. [default: False]

arguments.name: filter
arguments.description: Optional filter to match package names (supports glob patterns).

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove one or more FHIR packages from the local cache.

arguments.name: packages
arguments.description: One or more package directives to remove (e.g. hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1)

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Clear the local FHIR package cache.

options.name: --ci-only
options.description: Only remove CI build (pre-release snapshot) packages. [default: False]

options.name: --older-than
options.description: Remove packages not accessed in the last N days.

options.name: --name
options.description: Package name prefix to search for.

options.name: --canonical
options.description: Filter by implementation guide canonical URL.

options.name: --fhir-version
options.description: Filter by FHIR version (R4, R4B, R5, R6).

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort results by: name, date, version.

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of results to return. [default: 50]

commands.name: info
commands.description: Display detailed information about a FHIR package.

commands.name: resolve
commands.description: Resolve a package directive to a concrete version and download URL.

arguments.name: directive
arguments.description: Package directive to resolve (e.g. hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1 or hl7.fhir.r4.core#latest).

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publish a FHIR package tarball to a registry.

arguments.name: tarball
arguments.description: Path to the .tgz package tarball to publish.
